name: How Do I Make A Boss Entity So It Can Show A Bossbar in game
snippet:
A boss is just an entity/mob that is difficult to kill. For the boss bar, you need to use a ServerBossBar in your entity.
For the boss bar, you need to use a ServerBossBar in your entity. e.g. look at WitherEntity.bossBar and its uses in that class
